zh.lifeSummary: 當Amicia Hughes於1285年出生在英國史洛普爾華特萊斯波洛時，她的父親Ralph Hughes26歲，母親Margaret de Beauchamp46歲。她於大約1303年與Thomas Corbet在英國英格蘭史洛普爾華特萊斯波洛結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1310年5月7日在英國英格蘭史洛普爾莫雷頓 可特享年25歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Amicia Hughes于1285年出生在英国史洛普爾華特萊斯波洛时，她的父亲Ralph Hughes26岁，母亲Margaret de Beauchamp46岁。她于大约1303年与Thomas Corbet在英国英格兰史洛普爾華特萊斯波洛结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1310年5月7日在英国英格兰史洛普爾莫雷頓 可特享年25岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hughes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Welsh: variant of Hugh with genitival or excrescent -s.
Irish and Scottish: adopted as an equivalent of Gaelic surnames based on the personal name Aodh ‘fire’, for example Ó hAodha, Mac Aodha; see McCoy and compare McHugh .

variants.name: Hugh
meanings: English, Welsh, and Scottish (of Norman origin): from the Old French personal name Hue, from ancient Germanic Hugo (ultimately derived from hugi- ‘mind, spirit’). This was a very popular name in England after the Norman Conquest, partly due to the reputation of Saint Hugh of Lincoln (1140–1200), who was born in Burgundy and who established the first Carthusian monastery in England.
Scottish and Irish: adopted as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic personal name Aodh, a derivative of a Gaelic word meaning ‘fire’. See Hughes .
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surnames 邱 and 丘, based on their Hakka pronunciation; see   Qiu   1 and 2.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Amicia Hughes was born in 1285, in Wattlesborough, Shropshire, England, her father, Ralph Hughes, was 26 and her mother, Margaret de Beauchamp, was 46. She married Thomas Corbet about 1303, in Wattlesborough, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 7 May 1310, in Moreton Corbet, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 25.

Elle a épousé Thomas Corbet environ 1303, à Wattlesborough, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 7 mai 1310, à Moreton Corbet, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 25 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Amicia Hughesが1285年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアワットレスボロウで生まれた時，父Ralph Hughesは26歳，母Margaret de Beauchampは46歳であった。約1303年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアワットレスボロウでThomas Corbetと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1310年5月7日にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアモーエトン コルベットで25歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Amicia Hughes(이)가 1285년 영국 슈럽실르 왓틀레스버루그h에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ralph Hughes(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret de Beauchamp(은)는 46세였다. 그녀는 대략 1303년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 왓틀레스버루그h에서 Thomas Corbet(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1310년 5월 7일 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 모레턴 코벳에서 25세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Amicia Hughes родилась в 1285 г. в местности ваттлесбороую, шропшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Ralph Hughes было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Beauchamp, 46. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Corbet около 1303 г. в местности ваттлесбороую, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла 7 мая 1310 г. в местности моретон корбет, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 25 лет.
